members.name: CaptureAabb
members.summary: Returns the axis-aligned bounding box that contains all the particles that are active in the current frame.

members.name: ConvertFromParticles
members.summary: Sets this node's properties to match a given [GPUParticles3D] node with an assigned [ParticleProcessMaterial].

members.name: GetParamCurve
members.summary: Returns the [Curve] of the parameter specified by [enum Parameter].

members.name: GetParamMax
members.summary: Returns the maximum value range for the given parameter.

members.name: GetParamMin
members.summary: Returns the minimum value range for the given parameter.

members.name: GetParticleFlag
members.summary: Returns the enabled state of the given particle flag.

members.name: RequestParticlesProcess
members.signature: public void RequestParticlesProcess(float processTime, float processTimeResidual)
members.summary: Requests the particles to process for extra process time during a single frame. [param process_time] defines the time that the particles will process while emitting is on. [param process_time_residual] defines the time that particles will process with emitting turned off for the simulation. When combined with [member speed_scale] set to [code]0.0[/code], this is useful to be able to seek a particle system timeline.

members.name: Restart
members.summary: Restarts the particle emitter. If [param keep_seed] is [code]true[/code], the current random seed will be preserved. Useful for seeking and playback.

members.name: SetParamCurve
members.signature: public void SetParamCurve(int param, Curve curve)
members.summary: Sets the [Curve] of the parameter specified by [enum Parameter]. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: SetParamMax
members.signature: public void SetParamMax(int param, float value)
members.summary: Sets the maximum value for the given parameter.

members.name: SetParamMin
members.signature: public void SetParamMin(int param, float value)
members.summary: Sets the minimum value for the given parameter.

members.name: SetParticleFlag
members.signature: public void SetParticleFlag(int particleFlag, bool enable)
members.summary: Enables or disables the given particle flag.

members.name: Amount
members.summary: Number of particles emitted in one emission cycle.

members.name: AngleCurve
members.summary: Each particle's rotation will be animated along this [Curve]. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: AngleMax
members.summary: Maximum angle.

members.name: AngleMin
members.summary: Minimum angle.

members.name: AngularVelocityCurve
members.summary: Each particle's angular velocity (rotation speed) will vary along this [Curve] over its lifetime. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: AngularVelocityMax
members.summary: Maximum initial angular velocity (rotation speed) applied to each particle in [i]degrees[/i] per second.

members.name: AngularVelocityMin
members.summary: Minimum initial angular velocity (rotation speed) applied to each particle in [i]degrees[/i] per second.

members.name: AnimOffsetCurve
members.summary: Each particle's animation offset will vary along this [Curve]. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: AnimOffsetMax
members.summary: Maximum animation offset.

members.name: AnimOffsetMin
members.summary: Minimum animation offset.

members.name: AnimSpeedCurve
members.summary: Each particle's animation speed will vary along this [Curve]. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: AnimSpeedMax
members.summary: Maximum particle animation speed.

members.name: AnimSpeedMin
members.summary: Minimum particle animation speed.

members.name: Color
members.summary: Each particle's initial color. [b]Note:[/b] [member color] multiplies the particle mesh's vertex colors. To have a visible effect on a [BaseMaterial3D], [member BaseMaterial3D.vertex_color_use_as_albedo] [i]must[/i] be [code]true[/code]. For a [ShaderMaterial], [code]ALBEDO *= COLOR.rgb;[/code] must be inserted in the shader's [code]fragment()[/code] function. Otherwise, [member color] will have no visible effect.

members.name: ColorInitialRamp
members.summary: Each particle's initial color will vary along this [Gradient] (multiplied with [member color]). [b]Note:[/b] [member color_initial_ramp] multiplies the particle mesh's vertex colors. To have a visible effect on a [BaseMaterial3D], [member BaseMaterial3D.vertex_color_use_as_albedo] [i]must[/i] be [code]true[/code]. For a [ShaderMaterial], [code]ALBEDO *= COLOR.rgb;[/code] must be inserted in the shader's [code]fragment()[/code] function. Otherwise, [member color_initial_ramp] will have no visible effect.

members.name: ColorRamp
members.summary: Each particle's color will vary along this [Gradient] over its lifetime (multiplied with [member color]). [b]Note:[/b] [member color_ramp] multiplies the particle mesh's vertex colors. To have a visible effect on a [BaseMaterial3D], [member BaseMaterial3D.vertex_color_use_as_albedo] [i]must[/i] be [code]true[/code]. For a [ShaderMaterial], [code]ALBEDO *= COLOR.rgb;[/code] must be inserted in the shader's [code]fragment()[/code] function. Otherwise, [member color_ramp] will have no visible effect.

members.name: DampingCurve
members.summary: Damping will vary along this [Curve]. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: DampingMax
members.summary: Maximum damping.

members.name: DampingMin
members.summary: Minimum damping.

members.name: Direction
members.summary: Unit vector specifying the particles' emission direction.

members.name: DrawOrder
members.summary: Particle draw order.

members.name: EmissionBoxExtents
members.summary: The rectangle's extents if [member emission_shape] is set to [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_BOX].

members.name: EmissionColors
members.summary: Sets the [Color]s to modulate particles by when using [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_POINTS] or [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_DIRECTED_POINTS]. [b]Note:[/b] [member emission_colors] multiplies the particle mesh's vertex colors. To have a visible effect on a [BaseMaterial3D], [member BaseMaterial3D.vertex_color_use_as_albedo] [i]must[/i] be [code]true[/code]. For a [ShaderMaterial], [code]ALBEDO *= COLOR.rgb;[/code] must be inserted in the shader's [code]fragment()[/code] function. Otherwise, [member emission_colors] will have no visible effect.

members.name: EmissionNormals
members.summary: Sets the direction the particles will be emitted in when using [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_DIRECTED_POINTS].

members.name: EmissionPoints
members.summary: Sets the initial positions to spawn particles when using [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_POINTS] or [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_DIRECTED_POINTS].

members.name: EmissionRingAxis
members.summary: The axis of the ring when using the emitter [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_RING].

members.name: EmissionRingConeAngle
members.summary: The angle of the cone when using the emitter [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_RING]. The default angle of 90 degrees results in a ring, while an angle of 0 degrees results in a cone. Intermediate values will result in a ring where one end is larger than the other. [b]Note:[/b] Depending on [member emission_ring_height], the angle may be clamped if the ring's end is reached to form a perfect cone.

members.name: EmissionRingHeight
members.summary: The height of the ring when using the emitter [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_RING].

members.name: EmissionRingInnerRadius
members.summary: The inner radius of the ring when using the emitter [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_RING].

members.name: EmissionRingRadius
members.summary: The radius of the ring when using the emitter [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_RING].

members.name: EmissionShape
members.summary: Particles will be emitted inside this region.

members.name: EmissionSphereRadius
members.summary: The sphere's radius if [enum EmissionShape] is set to [constant EMISSION_SHAPE_SPHERE].

members.name: Emitting
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], particles are being emitted. [member emitting] can be used to start and stop particles from emitting. However, if [member one_shot] is [code]true[/code] setting [member emitting] to [code]true[/code] will not restart the emission cycle until after all active particles finish processing. You can use the [signal finished] signal to be notified once all active particles finish processing.

members.name: Explosiveness
members.summary: How rapidly particles in an emission cycle are emitted. If greater than [code]0[/code], there will be a gap in emissions before the next cycle begins.

members.name: FixedFps
members.summary: The particle system's frame rate is fixed to a value. For example, changing the value to 2 will make the particles render at 2 frames per second. Note this does not slow down the particle system itself.

members.name: Flatness
members.summary: Amount of [member spread] in Y/Z plane. A value of [code]1[/code] restricts particles to X/Z plane.

members.name: FractDelta
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], results in fractional delta calculation which has a smoother particles display effect.

members.name: Gravity
members.summary: Gravity applied to every particle.

members.name: HueVariationCurve
members.summary: Each particle's hue will vary along this [Curve]. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: HueVariationMax
members.summary: Maximum hue variation.

members.name: HueVariationMin
members.summary: Minimum hue variation.

members.name: InitialVelocityMax
members.summary: Maximum value of the initial velocity.

members.name: InitialVelocityMin
members.summary: Minimum value of the initial velocity.

members.name: Lifetime
members.summary: Amount of time each particle will exist.

members.name: LifetimeRandomness
members.summary: Particle lifetime randomness ratio.

members.name: LinearAccelCurve
members.summary: Each particle's linear acceleration will vary along this [Curve]. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: LinearAccelMax
members.summary: Maximum linear acceleration.

members.name: LinearAccelMin
members.summary: Minimum linear acceleration.

members.name: LocalCoords
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], particles use the parent node's coordinate space (known as local coordinates). This will cause particles to move and rotate along the [CPUParticles3D] node (and its parents) when it is moved or rotated. If [code]false[/code], particles use global coordinates; they will not move or rotate along the [CPUParticles3D] node (and its parents) when it is moved or rotated.

members.name: Mesh
members.summary: The [Mesh] used for each particle. If [code]null[/code], particles will be spheres.

members.name: OneShot
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], only one emission cycle occurs. If set [code]true[/code] during a cycle, emission will stop at the cycle's end.

members.name: OrbitVelocityCurve
members.summary: Each particle's orbital velocity will vary along this [Curve]. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: OrbitVelocityMax
members.summary: Maximum orbit velocity.

members.name: OrbitVelocityMin
members.summary: Minimum orbit velocity.

members.name: ParticleFlagAlignY
members.summary: Align Y axis of particle with the direction of its velocity.

members.name: ParticleFlagDisableZ
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], particles will not move on the Z axis.

members.name: ParticleFlagRotateY
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], particles rotate around Y axis by [member angle_min].

members.name: Preprocess
members.summary: Particle system starts as if it had already run for this many seconds.

members.name: RadialAccelCurve
members.summary: Each particle's radial acceleration will vary along this [Curve]. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: RadialAccelMax
members.summary: Maximum radial acceleration.

members.name: RadialAccelMin
members.summary: Minimum radial acceleration.

members.name: Randomness
members.summary: Emission lifetime randomness ratio.

members.name: ScaleAmountCurve
members.summary: Each particle's scale will vary along this [Curve]. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: ScaleAmountMax
members.summary: Maximum scale.

members.name: ScaleAmountMin
members.summary: Minimum scale.

members.name: ScaleCurveX
members.summary: Curve for the scale over life, along the x axis.

members.name: ScaleCurveY
members.summary: Curve for the scale over life, along the y axis.

members.name: ScaleCurveZ
members.summary: Curve for the scale over life, along the z axis.

members.name: Seed
members.summary: Sets the random seed used by the particle system. Only effective if [member use_fixed_seed] is [code]true[/code].

members.name: SpeedScale
members.summary: Particle system's running speed scaling ratio. A value of [code]0[/code] can be used to pause the particles.

members.name: SplitScale
members.summary: If set to [code]true[/code], three different scale curves can be specified, one per scale axis.

members.name: Spread
members.summary: Each particle's initial direction range from [code]+spread[/code] to [code]-spread[/code] degrees. Applied to X/Z plane and Y/Z planes.

members.name: TangentialAccelCurve
members.summary: Each particle's tangential acceleration will vary along this [Curve]. Should be a unit [Curve].

members.name: TangentialAccelMax
members.summary: Maximum tangent acceleration.

members.name: TangentialAccelMin
members.summary: Minimum tangent acceleration.

members.name: UseFixedSeed
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], particles will use the same seed for every simulation using the seed defined in [member seed]. This is useful for situations where the visual outcome should be consistent across replays, for example when using Movie Maker mode.

members.name: VisibilityAabb
members.summary: The [AABB] that determines the node's region which needs to be visible on screen for the particle system to be active. Grow the box if particles suddenly appear/disappear when the node enters/exits the screen. The [AABB] can be grown via code or with the [b]Particles → Generate AABB[/b] editor tool.

signals.name: Finished
signals.summary: Emitted when all active particles have finished processing. When [member one_shot] is disabled, particles will process continuously, so this is never emitted.

values.name: DRAW_ORDER_INDEX
values.summary: Particles are drawn in the order emitted.

values.name: DRAW_ORDER_LIFETIME
values.summary: Particles are drawn in order of remaining lifetime. In other words, the particle with the highest lifetime is drawn at the front.

values.name: DRAW_ORDER_VIEW_DEPTH
values.summary: Particles are drawn in order of depth.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_BOX
values.summary: Particles will be emitted in the volume of a box.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_DIRECTED_POINTS
values.summary: Particles will be emitted at a position chosen randomly among [member emission_points]. Particle velocity and rotation will be set based on [member emission_normals]. Particle color will be modulated by [member emission_colors].

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum EmissionShape] enum.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_POINT
values.summary: All particles will be emitted from a single point.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_POINTS
values.summary: Particles will be emitted at a position chosen randomly among [member emission_points]. Particle color will be modulated by [member emission_colors].

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_RING
values.summary: Particles will be emitted in a ring or cylinder.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_SPHERE
values.summary: Particles will be emitted in the volume of a sphere.

values.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_SPHERE_SURFACE
values.summary: Particles will be emitted on the surface of a sphere.

values.name: PARAM_ANGLE
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set angle properties.

values.name: PARAM_ANGULAR_VELOCITY
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set angular velocity properties.

values.name: PARAM_ANIM_OFFSET
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set animation offset properties.

values.name: PARAM_ANIM_SPEED
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set animation speed properties.

values.name: PARAM_DAMPING
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set damping properties.

values.name: PARAM_HUE_VARIATION
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set hue variation properties.

values.name: PARAM_INITIAL_LINEAR_VELOCITY
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set initial velocity properties.

values.name: PARAM_LINEAR_ACCEL
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set linear acceleration properties.

values.name: PARAM_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Parameter] enum.

values.name: PARAM_ORBIT_VELOCITY
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set orbital velocity properties.

values.name: PARAM_RADIAL_ACCEL
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set radial acceleration properties.

values.name: PARAM_SCALE
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set scale properties.

values.name: PARAM_TANGENTIAL_ACCEL
values.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set tangential acceleration properties.

values.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_ALIGN_Y_TO_VELOCITY
values.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_align_y].

values.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_DISABLE_Z
values.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_disable_z].

values.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_MAX
values.summary: Represents the size of the [enum ParticleFlags] enum.

values.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_ROTATE_Y
values.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_rotate_y].

constants.name: DRAW_ORDER_INDEX
constants.summary: Particles are drawn in the order emitted.

constants.name: DRAW_ORDER_LIFETIME
constants.summary: Particles are drawn in order of remaining lifetime. In other words, the particle with the highest lifetime is drawn at the front.

constants.name: DRAW_ORDER_VIEW_DEPTH
constants.summary: Particles are drawn in order of depth.

constants.name: PARAM_INITIAL_LINEAR_VELOCITY
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set initial velocity properties.

constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set angular velocity properties.

constants.name: PARAM_ORBIT_VELOCITY
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set orbital velocity properties.

constants.name: PARAM_LINEAR_ACCEL
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set linear acceleration properties.

constants.name: PARAM_RADIAL_ACCEL
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set radial acceleration properties.

constants.name: PARAM_TANGENTIAL_ACCEL
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set tangential acceleration properties.

constants.name: PARAM_DAMPING
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set damping properties.

constants.name: PARAM_ANGLE
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set angle properties.

constants.name: PARAM_SCALE
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set scale properties.

constants.name: PARAM_HUE_VARIATION
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set hue variation properties.

constants.name: PARAM_ANIM_SPEED
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set animation speed properties.

constants.name: PARAM_ANIM_OFFSET
constants.summary: Use with [method set_param_min], [method set_param_max], and [method set_param_curve] to set animation offset properties.

constants.name: PARAM_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum Parameter] enum.

constants.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_ALIGN_Y_TO_VELOCITY
constants.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_align_y].

constants.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_ROTATE_Y
constants.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_rotate_y].

constants.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_DISABLE_Z
constants.summary: Use with [method set_particle_flag] to set [member particle_flag_disable_z].

constants.name: PARTICLE_FLAG_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum ParticleFlags] enum.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_POINT
constants.summary: All particles will be emitted from a single point.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_SPHERE
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted in the volume of a sphere.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_SPHERE_SURFACE
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted on the surface of a sphere.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_BOX
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted in the volume of a box.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_POINTS
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted at a position chosen randomly among [member emission_points]. Particle color will be modulated by [member emission_colors].

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_DIRECTED_POINTS
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted at a position chosen randomly among [member emission_points]. Particle velocity and rotation will be set based on [member emission_normals]. Particle color will be modulated by [member emission_colors].

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_RING
constants.summary: Particles will be emitted in a ring or cylinder.

constants.name: EMISSION_SHAPE_MAX
constants.summary: Represents the size of the [enum EmissionShape] enum.
